title: acourtia tomentosa
intro: Acourtia tomentosa, also known as the woolly acourtia, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Acourtia tomentosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. Acourtia tomentosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or topical ointment to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
